description: Four chain-envelope conformance vectors in the AAE shape, each decided by the shipped APS verifier (verifyDelegation + scopeCovers) via a small AAE->APS delegation-chain adapter.

vectors.aae_section: §2.2/2.3 scope (mandate.actions); child is a strict subset of parent
vectors.aps_reference: tests/property-delegation.test.ts (INV-2 Scope Monotonic Narrowing); core scopeCovers

vectors.expected_reason: scope-widening: child_scope is not a subset of parent_scope (child grants write/delete the delegator does not hold)
vectors.aps_reference: tests/property-delegation.test.ts (INV-2) and tests/v2/delegation-escalation.test.ts (delegation_scope_expansion); subDelegate raises 'Scope violation: [..] not in parent scope [..]'

vectors.expected_reason: parent validity.not_after is in the past; an expired ancestor invalidates the subtree
parent revocation_check resolves to revoked; revocation of an ancestor cascades to the subtree at verification time (check-time, not next-lookup)
vectors.aps_reference: tests/conformance/golden-fixtures/NEG-STALE-REVOCATION.json; verifyDelegation with cachedRevocationState marks the node revoked at check time
